children.text: the term “preservation district” means the Jimmy Carter National Preservation District established under ;section 410hhhh–1 of this title
the term “historical park” means the Jimmy Carter National Historical Park established under ; andsection 410hhhh of this title
the term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
